MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Anthony H. Whipple, Esq. of ACKER, KOWALICK & WHIPPLE, for defendant Dixie Packing & Gasket Co. Inc. moving to quash service of summons

RULING:
Counsel did not notify the opposing party of his intention to appear in this hearing. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT DIXIE PACKING & GASKET COMPANY INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS -- Motion to quash is denied re: insufficient service. As to minimum contacts, the motion is continued to August 20, 2003 to permit personal jurisdiction discovery. Supplemental opposition is due 8/6, supplemental reply due 8/13. Courtesy copies to be supplied on respective filing dates. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
